text.title: Codebase RAG with Symbol-Boundary Chunking Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Index built on 200-line windows; agent retrieves half-function chunks.
antipattern.root-cause: Default chunker copied from blog post without AST integration.
antipattern.fix: Switch to tree-sitter or LSP based chunker; line-window only as fallback.

antipattern.symptom: Each chunk includes entire file context; index size blows up 5x.
antipattern.fix: Cap padding ≤ 30% chunk tokens; truncate to symbol signature only when over.

antipattern.symptom: Agent retrieves Python chunks when asking for TS impl.
antipattern.root-cause: Chunks carry no language / path metadata; ranker confused.
antipattern.fix: Mandatory metadata schema; reject chunks without language + symbol_kind.

antipattern.symptom: Re-indexing re-embeds the entire corpus every CI run.
antipattern.root-cause: Chunk IDs are randomly-generated, not content-hashed.
antipattern.fix: Adopt sha256-based deterministic IDs; only re-embed when content changes.
